changelog: Error dialogs now match the color scheme of whichever window they appear in (Ocean green, Air purple, etc.) and include a right-click Copy/Select All menu. Real errors (inside except blocks) show a 'Report Issue' button that sends the full traceback to Discord; validation messages (like 'enter AWB first') do not. Paste to Manifest now auto-runs Copy from COLS first if needed, guards against non-numeric declaration values instead of crashing, and gives clearer permission error messages. Window heights increased to prevent the bug icon from being clipped.
